file.string: Automatically download attachments for incoming emails
Only download attachments when manually requested

Un pacchetto per chi lavora da casa.

Un pacchetto avanzato per medie imprese.
Un pacchetto base per piccole aziende.
Automatically download attachments for incoming emails

Insert at least username and password

A tailor -made package for large companies.

A premium package for large companies.
An advanced package for medium -sized enterprises.
A basic package for small companies.
